name: Security Strategies for Microservices-based Application Systems
owner: National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST)
description: NIST SP 800-204 series (A, B, C, D) covers microservices security: 204 base, 204A (service mesh proxies), 204B (attribute-based access control), 204C (service mesh implementation), 204D (DevSecOps integration). Multi-volume technical guidance.
relationToCloudSecurity: Direct cloud-native architecture security guidance. Used in Kubernetes/service-mesh designs.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI inference services exposed as microservices.

license.notes: Work of NIST is in the US public domain (17 USC §105).

lifecycle.notes: Multi-volume series; base 800-204 published 2019, sub-volumes through 2023.

current_extraction.notes: Metadata-only stub. Source PDF acquisition + extraction is TODO.

notes: Metadata stub; acquire from NIST CSRC and extract.
